pages.title: Where are we??
pages.text: Simple: You're  Nowhere, no I don't mean lost in a standard sense, you are quite literally in Nowhere, also known as The Plane of the Lost. It is a dry, nearly lifeless world stalked by undead. How did we get here? No idea, you could have come here willingly, or just happened to be (un)lucky to get here. I recommend you find some parched trees to punch down.
